impact: This gives PP&D requirement extraction a deterministic expected-output target for FCC wireless applications across eligibility, plan review, uploads, fees, corrections, finalization, and confirmation gates without live crawling or private DevHub artifacts.
summary: Add a narrow redacted FCC wireless application expected-output fixture and validation test with exactly seven source-backed category records.
target_task: Task checkbox-112: Add a minimal FCC wireless application requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly seven category records: eligibility, plan-review applicability, upload requirements, fee/payment checkpoints, corrections, inspections/finalization, and explicit-confirmation gates, all source-backed and redacted.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
